_notes: Phase 6 Adjustment Grid config -- see docs/ADJUSTMENT_GRID_DESIGN.md.
Per-property-type presets of which quantitative category columns and
qualitative factors apply by default. Every category column stays
addable/overridable by hand in the workbook regardless of preset --
these lists only control what's pre-built, never what's allowed.
qualitative.threshold is Derek's explicit 'needs to be adjustable if
things need tuning' requirement (2026-07-10) -- change the number below
to retune Superior/Similar/Inferior sensitivity without touching code.
scoring: 'average' or 'sum' of a comp's factor scores (each factor is
0/1/-1). Derek confirmed 'average' with a +/-0.3 cutoff on 2026-07-10.
threshold: |score| below this maps to 'similar'; above maps to

office_retail_industrial._notes: Majority preset -- 7 of 10 real market-chart files inspected.

apartment._notes: Same shape as office/retail/industrial; adds Amenities and Price Per Unit, drops Traffic.

land._notes: Price/SF basis (matches the real template's land grid, not per-acre as originally assumed here on 2026-07-10); swaps in Topography/Surrounding Land Uses, drops Quality/Condition/LTB entirely.
